scope: legacy-parity migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Looker API surface (queries, renders, scheduled plans, content, embed, connections, boards, alerts, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: auth token exchange, not a syncable object stream; modeled by base.auth's oauth2_client_credentials candidates
/queries/{query_id}/run/{result_format} is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/looks/{look_id}/run/{result_format} is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/scheduled_plans is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/content_metadata is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/connections is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/boards is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/alerts is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
Connector is read-only in pm today
user deletion; not a safe reverse-ETL action
